name: django-jazzmin

metadata.name: django-jazzmin
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Drop-in theme for django admin, that utilises AdminLTE 3 & Bootstrap 4 to make yo' admin look jazzy

documentation:
# Django jazzmin (Jazzy Admin)

## Project Status

This project is being actively maintained, though with a reduced feature set, we are looking for contributors to help
maintain and improve the project, please get in touch if you would like to help.

Help needed with:

- Triaging issues
- Frontend fixes and UI improvements
- Testing
- Documentation

Pull requests are welcome, though ive been pre-occupied with other projects lately, so have not been able to review
them as quickly as I would like, but im trying to get through them all now, hopefully with some outside help.

[![Docs](https://readthedocs.org/projects/django-jazzmin/badge/?version=latest)](https://django-jazzmin.readthedocs.io)
![PyPI download month](https://img.shields.io/pypi/dm/django-jazzmin.svg)
[![PyPI version](https://badge.fury.io/py/django-jazzmin.svg)](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/django-jazzmin/)
![Python versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-%3E=3.8-brightgreen)
![Django Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/django-%3E=4.2-brightgreen)
[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/repos/github/farridav/django-jazzmin/badge.svg?branch=master)](https://coveralls.io/github/farridav/django-jazzmin?branch=master)

Drop-in theme for django admin, that utilises AdminLTE 3 & Bootstrap 4 to make yo' admin look jazzy

## Installation

```bash
pip install django-jazzmin
```

## Documentation

See [Documentation](https://django-jazzmin.readthedocs.io) or [Test App](https://github.com/farridav/django-jazzmin/tree/master/tests/test_app/library/settings.py)

## Features

- Drop-in admin skin, all configuration optional
- Customisable side menu
- Customisable top menu
- Customisable user menu
- 4 different Change form templates (horizontal tabs, vertical tabs, carousel, collapsible)
- Bootstrap 4 modal (instead of the old popup window, optional)
- Search bar for any given model admin
- Customisable UI (via Live UI changes, or custom CSS/JS)
- Responsive
- Select2 drop-downs
- Bootstrap 4 & AdminLTE UI components
- Using the latest [adminlte](https://adminlte.io/) + [bootstrap](https://getbootstrap.com/)

## Thanks

This was initially a Fork of <https://github.com/wuyue92tree/django-adminlte-ui> that we refactored so much we thought it
deserved its own package, big thanks to @wuyue92tree for all of his initial hard work, we are still patching into that
project were possible, but this project has taken a different direction.

The javascript modal implementation uses some code from [django-admin-interface](https://github.com/fabiocaccamo/django-admin-interface/blob/master/admin_interface/static/admin/js/popup_response.js), so thanks to @fabiocaccamo for original work

- Based on AdminLTE 3: <https://adminlte.io/>
- Using Bootstrap 4: <https://getbootstrap.com/>
- Using Font Awesome 5: <https://fontawesome.com/>

functions.name: jazzmin.utils.order_with_respect_to
documentation:
Order a list based on the location of items in the reference list, optionally, use a getter to pull values out of
the first list

functions.name: jazzmin.utils.get_admin_url
documentation: Return the admin URL for the given instance, model class or <app>.<model> string

functions.name: jazzmin.utils.get_custom_url
documentation: Take in a custom url, and try to reverse it

functions.name: jazzmin.utils.get_model_meta
documentation: Get model meta class

functions.name: jazzmin.utils.get_app_admin_urls
documentation: For the given app string, get links to all the app models admin views

functions.name: jazzmin.utils.get_view_permissions
documentation: Get model names based on a users view/change permissions

functions.name: jazzmin.utils.make_menu
documentation: Make a menu from a list of user supplied links

functions.name: jazzmin.settings.get_search_model_string
documentation:
Get a search model string for reversing an admin url.

Ensure the model name is lower cased but remain the app name untouched.

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.get_side_menu
documentation:
Get the list of apps and models to render out in the side menu and on the dashboard page

N.B - Permissions are not checked here, as context["available_apps"] has already been filtered by django

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.get_top_menu
documentation: Produce the menu for the top nav bar

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.get_user_menu
documentation: Produce the menu for the user dropdown

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.get_jazzmin_settings
documentation: Get Jazzmin settings, update any defaults from the request, and return

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.get_jazzmin_ui_tweaks
documentation: Return Jazzmin ui tweaks

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.get_jazzmin_version

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.get_user_avatar
documentation:
For the given user, try to get the avatar image, which can be one of:

    - ImageField on the user model
    - URLField/Charfield on the model
    - A callable that receives the user instance e.g lambda u: u.profile.image.url

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.jazzmin_paginator_number
documentation: Generate an individual page index link in a paginated list.

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.admin_extra_filters
documentation: Return the dict of used filters which is not included in list_filters form

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.jazzmin_list_filter
documentation:
Render out our list filter in a dropdown friendly format, for use by filter.html, see original implementation here

django.contrib.admin.templatetags.admin_list.admin_list_filter

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.jazzy_admin_url
documentation: Get the admin url for a given object

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.has_fieldsets
documentation: Do we have fieldsets

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.get_sections
documentation: Get and sort all of the sections that need rendering out in a change form

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.remove_lang
documentation: Remove the language code from the url, if we have one

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.debug
documentation: Add in a breakpoint() here and use filter in templates for debugging ;)

Go get the correct change form template based on the modeladmin being used,

documentation: Determines whether a user has sufficient permissions to view its own profile

functions.name: jazzmin.templatetags.jazzmin.app_is_installed
